metadata.title: States PCS: Himachal Pradesh GK for HPPSC Exams

questions.question: Who was the founder of Ritesh state in Himachal Pradesh?
questions.explanation: Rai Singh, the brother of Karam Prakash of Sirmaur, was the founder of Ritesh State

questions.question: In which year treaty was signed between Raja Raj Singh of Chamba and Raja Sansar Chand of Kangra at Chamba?
questions.explanation: Raja Raj Singh of Chamba and Raja Sansar Chand of Kangra signed a treaty in 1788 at Chamba

questions.question: Minjar fair is held in which of the following districts?
questions.explanation: Minjar fair is a famous fair which is held in Chamba district every year

questions.question: Which of the following districts of Himachal Pradesh is located on the international border of india?
questions.explanation: Kinnaur and Lahaul Spiti districts of Himachal Pradesh are located on the international border of india

questions.question: When was the Treaty of Sanjauli signed?
questions.explanation: The Treaty of Sanjauli was signed on 28th November 1815 between the British East India Company and the Gorkhas, ending the Anglo-Nepalese War. This treaty defined the boundaries and ceded territories to the British. The agreement was a significant diplomatic event in early 19th century South Asia.

questions.question: Chandra and Bhagha river meet at which place to form the Chenab river?
questions.explanation: Chandra and Bhagha river meet at Tandi in the Lahaul Spiti district of Himachal Pradesh to form the Chenab river

questions.question: Central Potato Research Institute is located at which place?
questions.explanation: Central Potato Research Institute is located at Bemloe (Shimla) in Himachal Pradesh

questions.question: Mian Chu-Chu and Vaid Surat Singh were the leaders of a revolt that took place in ______?
questions.explanation: Mian Chu-Chu and Vaid Surat Singh were the leaders of Pajhota movement that took place in Sirmaur in 1942

questions.question: When was Bilaspur state merged with Himachal Pradesh?
questions.explanation: Bilaspur state, which was not willing to merge with Indian Union in 1947, finally merged with Himachal Pradesh in 1954

questions.question: Which governor general of India visited Mandi in October 1871?
questions.explanation: Lord Mayo visited Mandi in Himachal Pradesh in October 1871
